glosses.vi: sự trở lại; sự trở về

translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi cô ấy trở về.
translations.hi: मैं उसके लौटने का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på at hun skal komme tilbake.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på att hon ska komma tillbaka.
translations.da: Jeg venter på, at hun kommer tilbage.
translations.ja: 彼女の帰りを待っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a prepositional complement with 'auf' + accusative.
Preposition; with 'warten' it governs the accusative (fixed prepositional object).
Possessive determiner agreeing with a feminine singular accusative noun ('Rückkehr'); marks possession (her/their).
Feminine noun, singular accusative; object of the preposition 'auf' (prepositional object).

sentences.target: Nach der Rückkehr koche ich etwas.

translations.de: Nach der Rückkehr koche ich etwas.
translations.en: After getting back, I'll cook something.
translations.es: Cuando vuelva, voy a cocinar algo.
translations.fr: Quand je rentrerai, je vais cuisiner quelque chose.
translations.zh-Hans: 回到家后我会做点东西吃。
translations.yue: 返嚟之後我會煮啲嘢食。
translations.pt: Quando eu voltar, vou cozinhar alguma coisa.
translations.vi: Khi về nhà, tôi sẽ nấu gì đó.
translations.nl: Als ik thuiskom, ga ik iets koken.
translations.hi: वापस आने के बाद मैं कुछ पकाऊँगा.
translations.nb: Når jeg kommer hjem, skal jeg lage noe mat.
translations.id: Saat pulang, saya akan memasak sesuatu.
translations.sv: När jag kommer hem, ska jag laga något.
translations.ro: Când mă întorc, o să gătesc ceva.
translations.da: Når jeg kommer hjem, vil jeg lave noget mad.
translations.ja: 帰ったら、何か作ります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative; temporal meaning 'after'.
Definite article, feminine singular dative; agrees with 'Rückkehr' after 'nach'.
Feminine noun, singular dative; object of the preposition 'nach'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; in verb-second position after a fronted PP.
1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of 'koche'.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as a direct object; accusative (form is invariable).

sentences.target: Seine Rückkehr freut die ganze Familie.

translations.de: Seine Rückkehr freut die ganze Familie.
translations.en: His return makes the whole family happy.
translations.es: Su regreso alegra a toda la familia.
translations.fr: Son retour fait plaisir à toute la famille.
translations.it: Il suo ritorno fa felice tutta la famiglia.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的归来让全家都很高兴。
translations.yue: 佢返嚟令到成家人都好開心。
translations.pt: A volta dele deixa toda a família feliz.
translations.tr: Onun dönüşü tüm aileyi mutlu ediyor.
translations.vi: Sự trở về của anh ấy làm cả gia đình vui.
translations.nl: Zijn terugkeer maakt de hele familie blij.
translations.hu: Az ő visszatérése az egész családot boldoggá teszi.
translations.hi: उसकी वापसी से पूरा परिवार खुश हो जाता है.
translations.el: Η επιστροφή του κάνει όλη την οικογένεια χαρούμενη.
translations.nb: Hans hjemkomst gjør hele familien glad.
translations.sv: Hans återkomst gör hela familjen glad.
translations.da: Hans hjemkomst gør hele familien glad.
translations.fi: Hänen paluunsa tekee koko perheen iloiseksi.
translations.ja: 彼の帰りは家族みんなを喜ばせます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; agrees with 'Rückkehr' and marks possession.
Feminine noun, singular nominative; subject of 'freut'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; used transitively here ('to please'), agreeing with the 3rd sg subject.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; marks the direct object 'Familie'.
Attributive adjective, weak inflection (-e) with definite article; modifies 'Familie' in accusative singular feminine.
Feminine noun, singular accusative; direct object of 'freut' (entity that is pleased).

sentences.target: Wir planen die Rückkehr für nächsten Montag.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈplaːnən diː ˈʁʏkˌkeːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ ˈnɛːçstn̩ ˈmoːntaːk/

translations.de: Wir planen die Rückkehr für nächsten Montag.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈplaːnən diː ˈʁʏkˌkeːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ ˈnɛːçstn̩ ˈmoːntaːk/
translations.en: We’re planning the return for next Monday.
translations.es: Estamos planeando el regreso para el próximo lunes.
translations.fr: Nous planifions le retour pour lundi prochain.
translations.it: Stiamo pianificando il rientro per lunedì prossimo.
translations.ko: 다음 주 월요일에 돌아오기로 계획하고 있어요.
translations.yue: 我哋計劃下星期一返嚟。
translations.ru: Мы планируем возвращение на следующий понедельник.
translations.pt: Estamos planejando o retorno para a próxima segunda-feira.
translations.he: אנחנו מתכננים את החזרה ליום שני הבא.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi dự định sẽ về vào thứ Hai tới.
translations.ar: نحن نخطط للعودة يوم الاثنين القادم.
translations.nl: We plannen de terugkeer voor aanstaande maandag.
translations.uk: Ми плануємо повернення на наступний понеділок.
translations.hi: हम अगले सोमवार को लौटने की योजना बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σχεδιάζουμε την επιστροφή για την επόμενη Δευτέρα.
translations.nb: Vi planlegger hjemreisen til neste mandag.
translations.id: Kami merencanakan kepulangan pada Senin depan.
translations.sv: Vi planerar återresan til nästa måndag.
translations.da: Vi planlægger hjemrejsen til næste mandag.
translations.ja: 来週の月曜日に帰る予定です。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of 'planen'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes a direct object ('die Rückkehr').
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; marks the direct object 'Rückkehr'.
Feminine noun, singular accusative; direct object of 'planen'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a time specification.
Attributive adjective, strong inflection, masculine accusative singular (no article present); modifies 'Montag'.
Proper noun (day of the week), masculine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.
